auth.signUpDescription: Enter your email and password to create an account.
auth.createAccountAgreement: By creating an account, you agree to our
auth.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
auth.switchToTenantAdminSignIn: Switch to Tenant Admin Sign In
auth.switchToPlatformAdminSignIn: Switch to Platform Admin Sign In
auth.entryHeadline: Run store execution and platform governance from one coordinated system.
auth.entryMetric1Description: Support daily store operations, checkout, inventory, and member workflows in one place.
auth.entryMetric2Description: Complete platform, tenant, and store actions inside a single working loop.
auth.entryMetric3Description: Keep a stable, verifiable baseline for local integration and production deployment.
auth.entryFooterDescription: The tenant console is optimized for daily business execution, while the platform console focuses on tenant governance and system configuration.
auth.tenantEntryDescription: For store, regional, or brand operations teams handling inventory, purchasing, members, online channels, and finance operations.
auth.platformEntryDescription: For platform governance teams responsible for tenants, permissions, menus, organizations, and platform-level configuration.
auth.tenantRoleDescription: Use the tenant code and your account credentials to enter the business console for stores, inventory, purchasing, members, and finance execution.
auth.platformRoleDescription: Use your platform account to enter the governance console for tenants, roles, menus, permissions, and platform-wide configuration.
auth.rolePanelHeadline: Sign in and go straight to your working console.
auth.rolePanelDescription: Role selection now happens before the form, reducing mis-clicks and making the authentication flow feel like a production product instead of a demo page.
auth.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your registered email and we will send you a link to reset your password.
auth.otpDescription: Please enter the authentication code. We have sent the authentication code to your email.
auth.otpSubmittedSummary: You submitted the following verification code:
auth.enterCredentials: Enter your credentials to sign in
auth.signInDescription: Choose platform or tenant mode, then enter your credentials to continue.
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 7 characters long
auth.agreePrefix: By clicking sign in, you agree to our
auth.signOutDescription: Are you sure you want to sign out? You will need to sign in again to access your account.

clerk.missingKeyDescription: You need to generate a publishable key from Clerk and put it inside the .env file.
clerk.apiKeysPageStep: In the <link>Clerk</link> Dashboard, navigate to the API keys page.
clerk.quickCopyStep: In the Quick Copy section, copy your Clerk Publishable Key.
clerk.pasteKeyStep: Paste your key into your .env file.
clerk.finalResultLabel: The final result should resemble the following:
clerk.optionalDescription: The Clerk integration lives entirely inside src/routes/clerk. If you plan to use Clerk as your auth service, you might want to place ClerkProvider at the root route.
clerk.optionalRemovalDescription: If you don't plan to use Clerk, you can safely remove this directory and the related dependency @clerk/clerk-react.
clerk.optionalNote: This setup is modular by design and won't affect the rest of the application.
clerk.authLayoutIntro: Welcome to the example Clerk auth page.
clerk.authLayoutQuote: This isolated Clerk area lets you evaluate hosted authentication without affecting the main ERP login flow.
clerk.sameAsUsersRoute: This page is the same as
clerk.userManagementProfileHint: You can sign out, manage your account, or delete it from the user profile menu in the top-right corner.
clerk.unauthorizedHint: You must first sign in using Clerk to access this route.
clerk.unauthorizedDetails: After signing in, you'll be able to sign out or delete your account via the user profile menu on this page.
clerk.redirectingToSignIn: Redirecting to the sign-in page in {{count}}s

users.title: User List
users.description: Manage your users and their roles here.
users.createDescription: Create new user here. Click save when you're done.
users.editDescription: Update the user here. Click save when you're done.
users.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete {{username}}? This action will permanently remove the user with the role {{role}} from the system. This cannot be undone.
users.deletedSummary: The following user has been deleted:
users.multiDeleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete the selected users? This action cannot be undone.
users.warningDescription: Please be careful, this operation cannot be rolled back.
users.inviteDescription: Invite a new user to join your team by sending them an email invitation. Assign a role to define their access level.
users.inviteOptionalPlaceholder: Add a personal note to your invitation (optional)
users.inviteSummary: The following invitation has been prepared:
users.saveSummary: The following user values have been submitted:
users.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
users.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
users.passwordLowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter.
users.passwordNumber: Password must contain at least one number.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your account settings and set e-mail preferences.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: This is how others will see you on the site.
profile.usernameDescription: This is your public display name. It can be your real name or a pseudonym. You can only change this once every 30 days.
profile.selectVerifiedEmail: Select a verified email to display
profile.emailDescriptionPrefix: You can manage verified email addresses in your
profile.bioPlaceholder: Tell us a little bit about yourself
profile.bioDescriptionSuffix: other users and organizations to link to them.
profile.urlsDescription: Add links to your website, blog, or social media profiles.

validation.usernameMinLength: Username must be at least 2 characters.
validation.usernameMaxLength: Username must not be longer than 30 characters.
validation.emailRequired: Please select an email to display.
validation.bioMinLength: Bio must be at least 4 characters.
validation.bioMaxLength: Bio must not be longer than 160 characters.

account.title: Account
account.description: Update your account settings. Set your preferred language and timezone.
account.name: Name
account.nameDescription: This is the name that will be displayed on your profile and in emails.
account.dobDescription: Your date of birth is used to calculate your age.
account.languageDescription: This is the language that will be used in the dashboard.

validation.nameMinLength: Name must be at least 2 characters.
validation.nameMaxLength: Name must not be longer than 30 characters.
validation.dobRequired: Please select your date of birth.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Customize the appearance of the app. Automatically switch between day and night themes.
appearance.fontDescription: Set the font you want to use in the dashboard.
appearance.themeDescription: Select the theme for the dashboard.

display.title: Display
display.description: Turn items on or off to control what's displayed in the app.
display.sidebarDescription: Select the items you want to display in the sidebar.

validation.itemsRequired: You have to select at least one item.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.communicationEmailsDescription: Receive emails about your account activity.
notifications.marketingEmailsDescription: Receive emails about new products, features, and more.
notifications.socialEmailsDescription: Receive emails for friend requests, follows, and more.
notifications.securityEmailsDescription: Receive emails about your account activity and security.
notifications.mobile: Use different settings for my mobile devices
notifications.mobileDescriptionPrefix: You can manage your mobile notifications in the

apps.title: App Integrations
apps.description: Here's a list of your apps for the integration!

items.telegram: Connect with Telegram for real-time communication.
items.notion: Effortlessly sync Notion pages for seamless collaboration.
items.figma: View and collaborate on Figma designs in one place.
items.trello: Sync Trello cards for streamlined project management.
items.slack: Integrate Slack for efficient team communication.
items.zoom: Host Zoom meetings directly from the dashboard.
items.stripe: Easily manage Stripe transactions and payments.
items.gmail: Access and manage Gmail messages effortlessly.
items.medium: Explore and share Medium stories on your dashboard.
items.docker: Effortlessly manage Docker containers on your dashboard.
items.github: Streamline code management with GitHub integration.
items.gitlab: Efficiently manage code projects with GitLab integration.
items.discord: Connect with Discord for seamless team communication.
items.whatsapp: Easily integrate WhatsApp for direct messaging.

messages.m3: For sure. Anyway, I should get back to reviewing the project.
messages.m4: Yeah, let me know what you think.
messages.m5: Oh, nice! I've been waiting for that. I'll check it out later.
messages.m6: They've added a dark mode option! It looks really sleek.
messages.m8: By the way, have you seen the new feature update?
messages.m10: Great! Let me know if you need any help.
messages.m11: Almost done. Just need to review a few things.
messages.m12: I'm good, thanks! Did you finish the project?
messages.m13: Hey Alex, I'm doing well! How about you?
messages.m14: Hey Bob, how are you doing?

messages.m1: Yeah, it's really well-explained. You should give it a try.
messages.m3: Hey, did you check out that new tutorial?
Yes, same time as usual. I'll send the invite shortly.
messages.m4: Are we still on for the meeting tomorrow?

messages.m3: Sure thing! I'll take a look in the next hour.
messages.m4: Hey! Do you have time to review my PR today?

messages.m2: Just sent you the files. Let me know if you need any changes.
messages.m3: I finished the design for the dashboard. Thoughts?

messages.m1: Same here! It's coming together nicely.
messages.m2: I'm really excited to see the final product!
messages.m3: How's the project looking on your end?

messages.m1: Got it! Thanks for the update.
messages.m2: The release has been delayed to next week.
messages.m3: Hey, any news on the release?

messages.m1: I'll join the call in a few minutes.
messages.m2: Perfect! We'll start as soon as you're in.

messages.m1: Sure thing, I'll send over the updates shortly.
messages.m2: Could you update the backend as well?
messages.m3: The frontend updates are done. How does it look?

messages.m1: Thanks! I'll review your code and get back to you.
messages.m2: Let me know if you need anything else.
messages.m3: The feature is implemented. Can you review it?
